title: Nihilism
description: Nihilism is a Create-centered kitchen sink modpack with focus on quality over quantity
body:
# Minecraft: Nihilism
Nihilism is a [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create)-centered modpack featuring new Vanilla+ styled content.
## What is Nihilism?
"Nihilism is the belief that all values are baseless and that nothing can be known or communicated. It is often associated with extreme pessimism and a radical skepticism that condemns existence. A true nihilist would believe in nothing, have no loyalties, and no purpose other than, perhaps, an impulse to destroy." ~ [Internet Encylopedia of Philosophy](https://iep.utm.edu/nihilism/)
## Who is this for?
Nihilism is a perfect modpack for people who do not want any quests or tasks that have to be done, everything the player does is in his own hands. In Nihilism you just exist - nothing more, nothing else. This modpack gives you the freedom to embrace nihilism or fight against it, depending on your philosophical views.
## Do I need to know anything before starting?
No, just create a new world and see where it takes you, there is no specific task.
## What are the needs?
Regarding the client, I recommend at least 4-5 GB of dedicated RAM.
The server heavily depends on the player count. For a server with a small player-base (~5 players online at a time) 4-5 GB dedicated RAM should be fine.
